parents.subject: LU-17231 doc: Added man pages for adaptive timeouts

commit.subject: LU-12268 osd-ldiskfs: zero buffer in iam_new_node
commit.message:
LU-12268 osd-ldiskfs: zero buffer in iam_new_node

osd_ldiskfs_append does not guarantee a newly allocated
block is zeroed. Explicitly reset the buffer to zero
to avoid corrupting the IAM tree and writing garbage data
back to disk.

Signed-off-by: Di Wang <ddiwang@google.com>
Change-Id: I7e2315bbcdbf0a3b14924de9b7c728da6b3d497c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63847
